title: Proof Boundary — Agentic AI Requires Human Oversight Architecture
supported_claims: Systems that can interpret goals, select actions, and use tools require explicit authority boundaries and escalation paths.
Human oversight must be designed through approval points, logging, exception handling, rollback conditions, and accountable ownership.
Observability and evidence trails are necessary for meaningful review of agentic actions.
unsupported_claims: Any product-specific claim not revalidated against current documentation.
Any claim that a single oversight pattern is sufficient for every risk class.
Any quantified claim about safety, reliability, or business outcomes without current evidence.
